exploration_notes:
The core type inference engine in the Rust compiler is spread across three key files:

1. **`compiler/rustc_infer/src/infer/mod.rs`** — Defines `InferCtxt<'tcx>` (line 231), the main inference context struct. It also defines `InferCtxtInner<'tcx>` (line 89) which holds internal mutable state (undo logs, projection cache, type/region/const variable tables), and `InferCtxtBuilder<'tcx>` (line 508) which constructs an `InferCtxt`.

2. **`compiler/rustc_hir_typeck/src/fn_ctxt/mod.rs`** — Defines `Fn
